arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Man United as Howe set for one key change
arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Man United: Dubravka; Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall; Tonali, Guimaraes, Joelinton; Murphy, Gordon, Isak. Eleswhere, while Willock and Sean Longstaff are strong options if Howe wants to rotate his midfield, Newcastle are likely to continue with the impressive trio of Tonali, Bruno and Joelinton, while the in-form Alexander Isak will again lead the line.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe has just solved Newcastle United problem Manchester United are still struggling with
arts.sum: "Early season there was chopping and changing because I wasn’t liking what I was seeing," Howe told reporters before the clash with Manchester United. Eddie Howe takes his Newcastle United side to Old Trafford on Monday evening knowing his starting XI all but picks himself.

arts.ttl: 'Excitement' - Eddie Howe makes ambitious statement ahead of Manchester United vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Man Utd play Newcastle in the Premier League on Monday and Eddie Howe is hopeful of an away victory.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United player being offered around to clubs with money – Transfer on the agenda
arts.sum: Miguel Almirón has been linked with a move away from Newcastle United in the winter market. The winger’s game time has been limited, with 136 minutes from seven league games this season. In the last two months, he’s been restricted to 34 minutes of action from two Premier League matches. arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted XI to face Newcastle as Ruben Amorim makes three changes
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim knows he must build up some morale at Manchester United with games against Liverpool and Arsenal coming up after the visit of in-form Newcastle, as he looks to end a run of three straight defeats

arts.ttl: Why Jason Tindall is missing from Newcastle United dugout at Man United tonight
arts.sum: There will be an unusual look to the Newcastle United bench at Old Trafford this evening - and Eddie Howe will be hoping it doesn't affect his side's performance against Manchester United. While Howe and Tindall are a familiar sight when the TV cameras focus on the Newcastle bench, the United head coach will not be short of support and advice this evening.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United stars set for tearful exits in 2025 with contracts up and veteran eyes new deal
arts.sum: He last signed a contract on January 8 this year so there is every chance a new deal is waiting to be triggered for the ex-Switzerland international. One soon to be expired contract that is currently under the microscope has to be Martin Dubravka's deal.

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Man United – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United make the trip to Manchester United on Monday evening looking to continue their promising run of form. Eddie Howe’s side are searching for a fifth consecutive win in all competitions. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford exit confirmed as wish granted - Man Utd's perfect January transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to enter their first transfer window with Ruben Amorim in charge and their first since sporting director Dan Ashworth's Old Trafford exit

Ruben Amorim has endured a challenging start to his tenure at Old Trafford.
